entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: An emerging methodology used to select superior lines among experimental cultivars in plant breeding programs to increase productivity and genetic gains while reducing breeding cycles

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop species for which genomic selection models were implemented to improve hybrid prediction and breeding programs

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The phenotypic trait used to evaluate and compare the performance of genomic selection models

entities.name: WHOLE GENOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: A technique that provides the inexpensive and dense marker information required for successful genomic selection

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: Dense genetic information used as input for genomic selection models, obtained from genotyping platforms

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL GBS RAD-SEQ
entities.description: A genotyping platform (C) used to obtain dense molecular marker information for pearl millet

entities.name: TUNABLE GBS TGBS
entities.description: A genotyping platform (T) used to obtain dense molecular marker information, identified as a superior strategy for genomic selection

entities.name: CROSS-VALIDATION SCHEMES
entities.description: Evaluation frameworks (CV0, CV1, CV2) used to test genomic selection models by mimicking real-world breeding scenarios

entities.name: CV2
entities.description: A cross-validation scheme that mimics the situation of an incomplete field trial

entities.name: CV1
entities.description: A cross-validation scheme used to predict the performance of untested hybrids

entities.name: CV0
entities.description: A cross-validation scheme used to predict the performance of hybrids in unobserved environments

entities.name: INCOMPLETE FIELD TRIAL
entities.description: A real-world breeding situation mimicked by the CV2 cross-validation scheme

entities.name: UNTESTED HYBRIDS
entities.description: Hybrids whose performance is predicted using the CV1 cross-validation scheme

entities.name: UNOBSERVED ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environmental conditions not present in the training set, mimicked by the CV0 cross-validation scheme

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC INFORMATION OF PARENTAL INBREDS
entities.description: Data regarding the traits of parental lines added to calibration sets to improve the predictive ability of GS models

entities.name: GENOTYPE-BY-ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between genetic makeup and environmental factors, which, when accounted for, increases model performance
